source: Confluence GPU/AGA5 DH2 (Atom) Bootstrap Sequence page plus parsed ncpcli current-devices capture from /Users/arjrr/.codex/memories/aga5_2.txt. The capture showed aga5-q3 selected zero devices; live qfabric inventory is aga5-q2.
assumptions: AGA5.2 live qfabric inventory uses fabric_instance 2 / q2 naming; aga5-q3 selected zero devices in the aga5_2.txt capture.
Placement Group is retained as the source-of-truth Confluence term; deployment_group_alias is included as DG<n> for reporting compatibility.
No missing rack positions were inferred; anomalies reflect the connector output as fetched.

GPU GB300.notes: 18 GPUs per compute tray; 72 GPUs per rack

QFABT0.notes: 8 devices per rack; 64 devices per plane

qfabt0_to_gpus.per_plane: 128 x 200G on each switch; 128 x 56 qfabt0 = 7168 connections

qfabt0_to_qfabt1.per_plane: 64 x 400G ports on each switch; 64 x 56 qfabt0 = 3584 connections

qfabt1_to_ips.per_plane: 16 x 25G ports on each switch; 16 x 8 = 128 connections

bootstrap_sequence: Bootstrap QFABT0 racks based on placement groups
Validate QFABT0 <> QFABT1, place QFABT0 in-service
Repeat QFABT0 bootstrap and validation for all placement groups

11.notes: Listed rack count differs from Total Racks value in the Confluence connector output.

selection_attempts.result: failed: option name was invalid; ncpcli suggested --device-names-matching
current-devices -va returned full baseline inventory; this JSON filters it to aga5-q2 qfabric roles

live_device_collection.device_scope: aga5-q2 qfabric rows only: qfabip, qfabt0, qfabt1

anomalies: GPU placement group 11 lists 8 rack positions but Total Racks is 9.
Unique racks listed from parsed page data: 280; Rack Count table total: 281.
aga5_2.txt showed update-device-list --device-names-matching "aga5-q3" selected zero devices; parsed qfabric devices use aga5-q2.
Parsed aga5-q2 qfabric counts from aga5_2.txt: qfabip=8, qfabt0=405, qfabt1=245.
Parsed live counts are below the design summary for qfabt0/qfabt1; missing device indices are recorded under ncpcli.live_device_collection.missing_device_indices_by_role_and_plane.
